title: ci(cbsp21): per-PR patch manifests to end the shared-file merge footgun
intent: Concurrent PRs used to conflict on the single fixed manifest path .cbsp21/patch_input.json because every PR overwrote the same file; every second PR to merge had to hand-resolve it (keep-ours). This moves patch manifests to per-PR files under .cbsp21/patches/<patch-id>.json (distinct filenames never conflict) and teaches both gates to auto-discover all manifests and validate the diff against the single best-covering one. The legacy single-file path is still honored so in-flight PRs keep passing. This manifest itself lives in the new location, dogfooding the mechanism.

diff_articulation.what_changed: New scripts/ci/cbsp21_manifest_discovery.py provides pure discover/select helpers: discover_manifest_paths (.cbsp21/patches/*.json sorted, then legacy patch_input.json), load_candidates, and select_manifest (ranks by files-covered, then fewest-declared-tokens, then path). check_cbsp21_patch_input.py: removed the hardcoded MANIFEST_PATH read; computes the diff first, discovers candidates (or an explicit --manifest override), selects the best-covering manifest, and validates it; the undeclared-files ignore now covers the whole .cbsp21/ prefix. check_cbsp21_gate.py: --manifest is now optional; resolve_manifest() auto-discovers and selects, then applies the existing schema/coverage/behavior/architecture checks unchanged. cbsp21_gate.yml drops the hardcoded --manifest flag and lists discovered manifests in the summary. Added a per-PR manifest here plus a patches/README.md convention doc and unit tests.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: This changes how the CBSP21 gates locate their manifest: from one fixed path to per-PR discovery with best-coverage selection. It is not a cosmetic refactor — it removes a recurring merge-conflict class and preserves the 1:1 PR<->manifest binding that coverage_min / behavior_change / architecture_scan checks depend on, with legacy back-compat so open PRs do not break.

commands_run: pytest scripts/ci/test_cbsp21_manifest_discovery.py -q -> all pass (discovery order, best-coverage selection, stale-legacy not shadowing, tie-break specificity, invalid-json loud fail)
python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS (selects this manifest)
python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --changed-files <this diff> -> 100% coverage PASS (auto-discovered, no --manifest)

files.intent: New shared, pure discover/select helper for per-PR manifests.
files.behavior_change: New module: defines how manifests are discovered and which one a diff is validated against.

files.intent: Discover+select instead of reading one fixed manifest path.
files.behavior_change: Manifest is now selected by diff coverage across .cbsp21/patches/*.json + legacy; ignore broadened to the .cbsp21/ prefix.

files.intent: Make --manifest optional; auto-discover + select best-covering manifest.
files.behavior_change: Coverage gate resolves its manifest via discovery when --manifest is omitted; explicit path still honored.

files.intent: Unit tests locking in discovery + selection behavior.

files.behavior_change: Gate job no longer pins .cbsp21/patch_input.json; relies on script auto-discovery.
